title: Transgender community turmoil: Leader held after 24 drinks ‘phenyl’; FIR against 4 after clash - The Times of India
excerpt: Transgender community turmoil: Leader held after 24 drinks ‘phenyl’; FIR against 4 after clash  The Times of India
summary: In Indore, 24 members of the transgender community allegedly consumed floor cleaner in a bid to die by suicide after claims of harassment and threats by members of a rival transgender faction; police detained Sapna Haji and the other accused were being searched.

title: Allegations swirl as 24 transgender residents of Indore attempt mass suicide - The Indian Express
excerpt: Allegations swirl as 24 transgender residents of Indore attempt mass suicide  The Indian Express
summary: In Nandlalpura, Indore, 24 transgender residents reportedly consumed floor cleaning material in an attempted mass suicide and were taken to hospital where they were stated to be in stable condition.

title: In demand for arrest of rape accused , 24 transgender attempt mass suicide in Madhya Pradesh Indore
summary: In Indore, 24 transgender persons attempted mass suicide by consuming floor cleaner in Nandlalpura after alleging that two men posing as journalists had raped and blackmailed a trans person, and police detained/registered cases against the accused.

title: 24 transgenders attempt mass suicide in Indore, demand arrest of rape accused - India Today
excerpt: 24 transgenders attempt mass suicide in Indore, demand arrest of rape accused  India Today
summary: Around 24 transgender people in Indore consumed phenyl in protest after alleging two men posing as journalists raped a transgender woman; all 24 were hospitalized and police registered a rape and extortion case while searching for the accused.

title: 10 cases of forced conversion of Hindu transgenders from different states of India - opindia.com
excerpt: 10 cases of forced conversion of Hindu transgenders from different states of India  opindia.com
summary: In Indore, Hindu transgender individuals alleged they were forced to convert to Islam and were given injections infected with HIV after refusing, resulting in 60 contracting HIV.

title: Indore man kills social media friend over transgender identity , hides chopped body at home
summary: An Indore man killed his social media friend, Mohsin alias Zoya Kinnar, after learning she was transgender, strangling her and cutting the body into parts before hiding them and being arrested by police.
